notes: Indian national standards body. Publishes Indian Standards (IS) including direct adoptions like IS/ISO/IEC 27001 and indigenous-only standards. License posture is mixed: indigenous Indian Standards are advertised as free-to-download at https://standardsbis.bsbedge.com/ (redistribution terms unclear); IS/ISO/IEC adoptions remain subject to ISO terms. Flag for verification before any public-repo ingestion of indigenous IS content.

match_nodes.description: IS/ISO/IEC adoptions — Indian editions of ISO/IEC standards

data.notes: Indian national editions of ISO/IEC standards. Technical content tracks the ISO master; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/<n>. Subject to ISO redistribution terms even when downloaded free from BIS.
